mapper.select: Select TATA.Link, TM.URL, ISNULL(TD.Name, TM.DicCode) AS LinkName, TIA.LovCode, TATA.AttrTypeCode From XBOLTADM.TB_ATTR_TYPE_ALLOCATION TATA Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MENU TM ON TM.MenuID = TATA.Link Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TD.TypeCode = TM.MenuID And TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = #{itemID} And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00037' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} Where ISNULL(TATA.Link,'') != '' And TATA.ItemClassCode = #{itemClassCode}
